creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 187129
keepassxc.diff

The last update in ports r451345 broke building keepassxc without AUTOTYPE.
See attached patch on how to fix it.

Please be careful when updating pkg-plist.

=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for keepassxc-2.2.1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/keepassxc/work/stage/usr/local/lib/keepassxc/libkeepassx-autotype-xcb.so:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/security/keepassxc
